Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23508203007|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Kanagawa | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | title = [[File:Shadow picture of Kanagawa prefecture.png|20x20px|Shadow picture of Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]]
| above = [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama]] {{small|([[:en:en:List of capitals in Japan|capital]])}} | image = [[File:Flag of Kanagawa.svg|60px|border|Flag of Kanagawa Prefecture]] | bodyclass = hlist
| group1 = [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama]] | list1 = {{Navbox|child | group1 = [[:en:Wards of Japan|Wards]] | list1 = *[[:en:Aoba-ku, Yokohama|Aoba]] *[[:en:Asahi-ku, Yokohama|Asahi]] *[[:en:Hodogaya-ku, Yokohama|Hodogaya]] *[[:en:Isogo-ku, Yokohama|Isogo]] *[[:en:Izumi-ku, Yokohama|Izumi]] *[[:en:Kanagawa-ku, Yokohama|Kanagawa]] *[[:en:Kanazawa-ku, Yokohama|Kanazawa]] *[[:en:Kōhoku-ku, Yokohama|Kōhoku]] *[[:en:Kōnan-ku, Yokohama|Kōnan]] *[[:en:Midori-ku, Yokohama|Midori]] *[[:en:Minami-ku, Yokohama|Minami]] *[[:en:Naka-ku, Yokohama|Naka]] *[[:en:Nishi-ku, Yokohama|Nishi]] *[[:en:Sakae-ku, Yokohama|Sakae]] *[[:en:Seya-ku, Yokohama|Seya]] *[[:en:Totsuka-ku, Yokohama|Totsuka]] *[[:en:Tsurumi-ku, Yokohama|Tsurumi]] *[[:en:Tsuzuki-ku, Yokohama|Tsuzuki]] }}
| group2 = [[:en:Kawasaki, Kanagawa|Kawasaki]] | list2 = {{Navbox|child | group1 = Wards | list1 = *[[:en:Asao-ku, Kawasaki|Asao]] *[[:en:Kawasaki-ku, Kawasaki|Kawasaki]] *[[:en:Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|Miyamae]] *[[:en:Nakahara-ku, Kawasaki|Nakahara]] *[[:en:Saiwai-ku, Kawasaki|Saiwai]] *[[:en:Takatsu-ku, Kawasaki|Takatsu]] *[[:en:Tama-ku, Kawasaki|Tama]] }}
| group3 = [[:en:Sagamihara|Sagamihara]] | list3 = {{Navbox|child | group1 = Wards | list1 = *[[:en:Chūō-ku, Sagamihara|Chūō]] *[[:en:Midori-ku, Sagamihara|Midori]] *[[:en:Minami-ku, Sagamihara|Minami]] }}
| group4 = [[:en:Core cities of Japan|Core city]] | list4 = *[[:en:Yokosuka|Yokosuka]]
| group5 = [[:en:Special cities of Japan|Special cities]] | list5 = *[[:en:Atsugi|Atsugi]] *[[:en:Chigasaki, Kanagawa|Chigasaki]] *[[:en:Hiratsuka|Hiratsuka]] *[[:en:Odawara|Odawara]] *[[:en:Yamato, Kanagawa|Yamato]]
| group6 = Cities | list6 = *[[:en:Ayase, Kanagawa|Ayase]] *[[:en:Ebina, Kanagawa|Ebina]] *[[:en:Fujisawa, Kanagawa|Fujisawa]] *[[:en:Hadano, Kanagawa|Hadano]] *[[:en:Isehara, Kanagawa|Isehara]] *[[:en:Kamakura|Kamakura]] *[[:en:Minamiashigara, Kanagawa|Minamiashigara]] *[[:en:Miura, Kanagawa|Miura]] *[[:en:Zama, Kanagawa|Zama]] *[[:en:Zushi, Kanagawa|Zushi]]
| group7 = Districts | list7 = *[[:en:Aikō District, Kanagawa|Aikō District]] **[[:en:Aikawa, Kanagawa|Aikawa]] **[[:en:Kiyokawa, Kanagawa|Kiyokawa]] *[[:en:Ashigarakami District, Kanagawa|Ashigarakami District]] **[[:en:Kaisei, Kanagawa|Kaisei]] **[[:en:Matsuda, Kanagawa|Matsuda]] **[[:en:Nakai, Kanagawa|Nakai]] **[[:en:Ōi, Kanagawa|Ōi]] **[[:en:Yamakita, Kanagawa|Yamakita]] *[[:en:Ashigarashimo District, Kanagawa|Ashigarashimo District]] **[[:en:Hakone|Hakone]] **[[:en:Manazuru, Kanagawa|Manazuru]] **[[:en:Yugawara|Yugawara]] *[[:en:Kōza District, Kanagawa|Kōza District]] **[[:en:Samukawa|Samukawa]] *[[:en:Miura District, Kanagawa|Miura District]] **[[:en:Hayama, Kanagawa|Hayama]] *[[:en:Naka District, Kanagawa|Naka District]] **[[:en:Ninomiya, Kanagawa|Ninomiya]] **[[:en:Ōiso|Ōiso]]
| below = * [[:en:List of mergers in Kanagawa Prefecture|List of mergers in Kanagawa Prefecture]] ;{{nobold|Other areas}} : [[:en:Shōnan|Shōnan]] : [[:en:Enoshima|Enoshima]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Japan prefecture templates]] [[Category:Kanagawa Prefecture]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
